message:
feat(raptorq): expand D9 replay catalog with boundary, error, and GF256 entries

Add 11 new replay catalog entries covering the remaining unit scenario
families that were referenced by the D5 unit test matrix but missing
from the D9 replay catalog, closing the linkage gap between replay_ref
values in test assertions and catalog entries.

New entries by scenario family:
- RQ-U-BOUNDARY-TINY (3 entries): k=1, k=2, and tiny symbol size
  boundary cases with decode_success expected outcome
- RQ-U-BOUNDARY-LARGE (1 entry): large block bounded decode with
  multi-seed profile fallback
- RQ-U-ERROR-INSUFFICIENT (1 entry): insufficient symbols error path
- RQ-U-ERROR-SIZE-MISMATCH (1 entry): symbol size mismatch error path
- RQ-U-ADVERSARIAL-LOSS (1 entry): random loss adversarial decode
- RQ-U-DETERMINISM-SEED (1 entry): seed-deterministic repair generation
- RQ-U-DETERMINISM-PROOF (1 entry): proof replay integrity
- RQ-U-GF256-ALGEBRA (1 entry): SIMD vs scalar equivalence with
  nibble table coverage
- RQ-U-SYSTEMATIC-RFC-EQUATION (1 entry): RFC tuple equation
  conformance

Each entry includes scenario_id, seed, fixture_ref, expected_outcome,
profile_tags, unit_tests, e2e_scripts, artifact_path, and repro_cmd
following the established catalog schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
